name: get_doctor_by_id
description: Get complete doctor details including doctorName by doctorId. Use this function to retrieve the actual doctor name when you have a doctorId. CRITICAL: Always call this function before mentioning a doctor in your response to get their real name.

doctorId.description: The unique identifier for the doctor (e.g., 'department_hospital_apollo_doctor_rajesh_kumar' or 'doctor_ent_001'). This is the ID you received from other functions.
